arts.ttl: Liam Delap reflects on Stoke City lesson as Man Utd, Chelsea and Newcastle eye £50m transfer
arts.sum: The son of Stoke legend Rory Delap was on loan at the bet365 Stadium for the first-half of the 2022/23 season, but when things did not go to plan he was recalled by Manchester City and sent to Preston instead, where he teamed up with one Tom Cannon. The 21-year-old then spent time at Hull City before being snapped up in a £20m deal by Ipswich Town last summer - and has since gone on to bag 12 top-flight goals in 30 appearances for the Tractor Boys - the latest against Wolves last weekend.

arts.ttl: Tom Lockyer joins Luton Town fans on 4,000km relay for CPR awareness
arts.sum: Luton Town’s captain has met with Hatters fans at Kenilworth Road stadium as they embark on a mega challenge to help raise awareness of CPR training.

arts.ttl: Former Stoke City player in shock return to bet365 Stadium tonight
arts.sum: Stoke was a big piece of my professional footballing career in England, so it’s super exciting to be coming back with my new business. The retired midfielder was one of the leading lights of Stoke’s youth squad, before his professional career took him across the Atlantic to play in the American USL Championship in 2015.

arts.ttl: Bloomfield insists noise levels are rising as Luton finally hit some form
arts.sum: Town look to make it five unbeaten at Stoke City

arts.ttl: Stoke City ready for the 'psychological stuff' as they bid to do what Leeds United couldn't
arts.sum: They will be seeking to extend that unbeaten sequence when fellow strugglers Luton Town come to the bet365 Stadium on Tuesday, but the Stoke boss has issued a warning - and a positive message - ahead of the 7.45pm kick-off. And while the Stoke coaching staff have been concentrating on their players’ physical wellbeing after a quick turnaround of just three days since Preston away until Luton at home, Robins said the “psychological stuff” was key too.

arts.ttl: Positive reaction from Town's fans to Leeds display leaves Hatters boss with a 'smile on my face'
arts.sum: Luton chief happy to see supporters' impressed with their side’s effort

arts.ttl: Luton Town count cost of Leeds United draw as 'big' message sent ahead of Stoke City test
arts.sum: But Doughty and striker Elijah Adebayo were both withdrawn during the second half of Luton’s 1-1 draw with Leeds on Saturday, leaving manager Matt Bloomfield to consider his options ahead of the 7.45pm kick-off at the bet365 Stadium. Second-from-bottom Luton go to Stoke knowing a win could lift them out of the relegation zone after two wins and two draws in their last four games, but Bloomfield warned his team to not lose focus.

arts.ttl: Sam Gallagher lifts lid on 'unsettled' first Stoke City season amid injury and manager change
arts.sum: Gallagher joined the club from Championship rivals Blackburn Rovers last summer, where he'd scored 37 goals in five seasons at Ewood Park, but the attacker's first campaign in a Stoke shirt was almost immediately disrupted by a calf complaint - a setback he'd suffered at Rovers previously - and then, upon his return, a hamstring issue followed. Especially coming into a new team at the start of the season and I was watching training through the windows of the gym, when I could've been out there getting to know everyone - it's maybe taken me a little longer to build up those relationships.
